properties.select_statement: SELECT customer_id, first_name, last_name, email, signup_date, country, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) AS _ingested_at, 'datastage flow' AS _ingested_by, 'raw_customers.csv' AS _source_file, 'datastage_seed_batch' AS _ingest_batch_id FROM iceberg_data.dbt_demo_raw.raw_customers

SELECT order_id, customer_id, order_ts, status, payment_method, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) AS _ingested_at, 'datastage flow' AS _ingested_by, 'raw_orders.csv' AS _source_file, 'datastage_seed_batch' AS _ingest_batch_id FROM iceberg_data.dbt_demo_raw.raw_orders

SELECT order_item_id, order_id, product_id, quantity, discount_pct, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) AS _ingested_at, 'datastage flow' AS _ingested_by, 'raw_order_items.csv' AS _source_file, 'datastage_seed_batch' AS _ingest_batch_id FROM iceberg_data.dbt_demo_raw.raw_order_items

SELECT product_id, product_name, category, unit_price, cast(current_timestamp as timestamp) AS _ingested_at, 'datastage flow' AS _ingested_by, 'raw_products.csv' AS _source_file, 'datastage_seed_batch' AS _ingest_batch_id FROM iceberg_data.dbt_demo_raw.raw_products
